backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user profiles, settings, experiences with categories, and CRUD operations including search, filtering by category/author, and trending experiences sorted by popularity.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, spacing, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta, favicon link, title 'Dini.Verse', and script tag loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with 15 routes (home, discover, profile, auth, create, etc.), ThemeProvider with light default, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: Card component displaying 'Login Required' message with navigation buttons to login and signup pages.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Authentication UI component showing logout button when authenticated or login/signup buttons when not, with loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: Authentication guard wrapper component that displays login prompt card with navigation buttons for unauthenticated users, otherwise renders children.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Interactive canvas component for 2D game builder supporting drag-to-move and corner-handle resize of BuilderElement objects with mouse event handling.
A component that provides a file input button to upload image files, reads them as data URLs, and adds them as decals to the 2D builder canvas.
Displays layer manipulation controls (bring forward, send backward, delete) for the currently selected element in the 2D builder.
A properties panel with sliders and inputs to edit position, opacity, rotation, color, and dimensions of the selected element in the 2D builder.
Manages saved props (canvas compositions) with functionality to save, load, delete, export, and import prop configurations using local storage.
Provides buttons to add basic shapes (rectangle, circle, triangle) to the 2D builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: A follow/unfollow button for creators that uses social following hooks and handles authentication, self-follow prevention, and mutation states.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays an experience as a card with thumbnail, title, description, creator info, and a play button that navigates to the experience detail page.
Renders a responsive grid of experience cards with loading skeletons and empty state handling.
Provides thumbs up/down rating buttons for experiences with authentication checks and displays current rating counts.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: An in-game overlay menu with options to leave, reset character, and access settings, using dialogs and alert dialogs for confirmations.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: Dialog component for publishing new experiences with form fields for title, description, category, gameplay controls, and thumbnail upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component that renders the site header, left sidebar, main content outlet, and footer in a flex-based structure.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: Alert banner component displaying a notice about on-platform authentication availability and disabled external login redirects.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: Sidebar navigation component with links to profile, social, inventory, groups, and settings pages, hidden on mobile devices.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer component displaying copyright information and a branded link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky header component with logo, navigation menu for home/discover/avatar-shop/create/dini-bucks, auth buttons, and mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Profile header card displaying user avatar, display name, and action buttons for discovering and publishing experiences.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: Panel component showing a list of followed creators with unfollow functionality and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: Social friends management panel with user search, friend request sending/accepting/declining, friends list display, and unfriend functionality.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: React component for a messaging interface with user search, conversation selection, message display, and sending functionality using custom hooks for user discovery, messages, and profiles.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: React component displaying a placeholder card for an upcoming party system feature that will allow users to create groups and join experiences together.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: React context provider for internationalization that manages language state from user settings and provides a translation function with fallback to English.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Custom React hooks for managing user account settings including display name, avatar, visibility, language, and account deletion using React Query and the actor backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Custom React hook managing state and operations for a 2D builder interface including adding/updating/deleting shapes and decals, z-index manipulation, and canvas management.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Custom React hook for managing saved 2D builder props with localStorage persistence, including save, delete, export, and import functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Simple custom React hook that wraps useSessionAuth to provide current user authentication state and loading status.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Custom React hooks for querying and mutating experiences (games/content) including search, filtering by author/category, trending, rating, and creation using React Query and the actor backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating experiences, user profiles, and categories, with many backend methods marked as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Implements session-based authentication with login, signup, and logout functionality using temporary mock tokens until backend methods are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Provides placeholder hooks for creator following/unfollowing functionality that are disabled until backend implementation is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Defines hooks for friend list management, friend requests, and unfriending, all marked as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and sending messages between users with a local Message type definition, awaiting backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Contains a disabled placeholder hook for party system functionality that is not yet available in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Simple wrapper hook that re-exports the translation context for internationalization support.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Provides a disabled user search hook that returns empty results until session-based backend implementation is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Defines hooks for user profile retrieval and signup that are disabled pending session-based authentication implementation in the backend.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Exports translation strings for English language covering navigation, authentication, home, discover, profile, social, settings (including avatar, username, display name, gender, language, privacy, notifications, security), inventory, groups, and common UI elements.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for theming (colors, spacing, sidebar, header), and base styles using the Outfit and Builder Sans font families.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Displays the Avatar Shop page with category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium Items, Animations) and a placeholder message indicating the shop is under development.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Landing page for creation tools with two main cards: one for creating games/experiences using a 2D builder, and another for creating UGC accessories.
Full 2D game builder interface with a canvas, shape palette, decal uploader, layer controls, properties panel, and props panel for creating game props and experiences.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator feature, displaying a coming soon message with a back button to the main Create page.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Displays the Dini Bucks virtual currency page showing user balance (if authenticated), authentication prompts for logged-out users, and feature cards for earning, spending, trading, and premium content.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Main discovery page for browsing and searching experiences with category tabs (adventure, roleplay, simulator), trending section, and authenticated users can publish new experiences via a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Detailed view page for a single experience showing metadata, creator info, play button, rating controls, gameplay controls, and an in-game menu when playing; increments player count on play.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder page for groups feature showing an empty state with a message that the user hasn't joined any groups yet.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page displaying personalized welcome card for authenticated users, recommended experiences grid, friend activity sidebar, and quick action buttons for creating and discovering experiences.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder page for user inventory showing an empty state with a message to visit the Avatar Shop to acquire items.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login form page with username and password fields using session authentication, includes error handling and a link to the signup page.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page wrapped in RequireProfile guard, displaying avatar, display name, username, and account information with buttons to edit profile and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component that allows users to manage their profile (display name, avatar, password), account visibility, gender/language preferences, theme selection, and account deletion with authentication required.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up page component with form validation for username, display name, and password fields that creates new user accounts via session authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social hub page with tabbed interface for friends, messages, parties, and following panels, requiring user authentication to access.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes various error types (Error objects, strings, backend traps) into user-friendly English error messages for display.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Utility functions for managing session tokens in localStorage with get, set, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors (using OKLCH), typography, container settings, animations, and design tokens for the application.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file indicating a known issue where TranslationProvider context is not initialized, with a pending fix request to wrap the app root in main.tsx.
